mapper.select: SELECT c.id,c.code, c.title, c.professor, c.credit FROM course c JOIN enrollment e ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE e.student_id = #{id} ORDER BY c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (code, title, professor, credit) VALUES (#{code}, #{title}, #{professor}, #{credit})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%'))
SELECT id, code, title, professor, created_at,credit FROM course
